title: Advanced Learner Loan application form for students whose courses start on or after 1 August 2025
body: "If you cannot apply online, apply by post using the ‘Advanced Learner Loan Application’ form – the postal address is on the form. There are guidance notes available to help you complete your application.  If your course starts on or after 1 August 2025, you’ll need to complete and send the ‘Advanced Learner Loan Application’ form for courses starting on or after 1 August 2025.  Read the student finance privacy notice to find out how the information you provide will be used. "
